title: Smoky Energizing Turkish Polish Kabanos Skewers
description: This dish combines the flavors and spices of Turkey with the savory taste of Polish kabanos, all while being mindful of FODMAP-friendly ingredients and adding a smoky twist. Perfect for a quick and energizing snack or side dish.
instructions: Cut the Polish kabanos sausage into 1-inch pieces. Cut the mixed bell peppers and onion into bite-sized chunks. Mince the garlic. Add the prepared vegetables and sausage to a large bowl. Add the salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika (if using) to the bowl and toss to coat. Thread the vegetables and sausage onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece. Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Grill the skewers over medium heat for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the sausage is cooked through and the vegetables are tender. Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
